title: Lightnin'
writer: Winchell Smith, Frank Bacon, Frances Marion
actors: Jay Hunt, Madge Bellamy, Wallace MacDonald
plot: Lightnin' Bill Jones, a man partial to the bottle, does chores and odd jobs around the Calivada Hotel, which is run by his wife and their adopted daughter, Millie. Real estate hucksters, learning that the hotel stands on a propose...
